'''Steven Jay Blum''' (born [[April 29]], [[1960s#1960|1960]]) is an American voice actor. Known for his distinctively deep voice, he has worked on various ''[[Star Wars]]'' projects, including [[Star Wars video games|video game]]s and animated series. For the animated series ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]'', he voiced [[Garazeb Orrelios|Garazeb "Zeb" Orrelios]], many [[stormtrooper]]s, [[Alton Kastle]], and others.
